title: Local and landscape-level environmental conditions drive habitat selection across terrestrial mammal species
author: Franke, Björn
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary Materials for "Local and landscape-level environmental conditions drive habitat selection across terrestrial mammal species". Includes Data and Code: The Data object contains the input data for the integrated step-selection analysis, i.e. all input steps with associated environmental variables, grouped by individual and species, without explicit spatial information & coordinates. Code file contains the analysis code including fitting of iSSFs, extraction and processing of coefficients, subsequent statistical analyses, and the code used to create the results figures.
